SYSTEM GOAL
Build and maintain a fully autonomous AI development + lead intelligence system.

ENVIRONMENT
GitHub repo access
CI execution
Railway deployment
Supabase database
Redis queue
Groq + Ollama LLM routing

REQUIRED OUTPUT

Frontend
Next.js
Tailwind
Monaco editor
Dashboard
Admin control plane

Backend
Node + Express
Postgres
Redis queue

Agents
planner
builder
scraper
validator
deployment

TOOLS
Playwright
GitHub API
Railway API
Supabase

TESTING
Playwright E2E
API tests
Agent tests

SUCCESS CONDITIONS
frontend loads
API responds
scraper returns real data
database stores data
deployment successful

VERIFICATION LOOP
if fail → fix → retest → repeat

CONSTRAINTS
must compile
must run
must deploy
must pass tests
